channel.title: Aws.amazon.com/Blogs/Dotnet on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Aws.amazon.com/Blogs/Dotnet on .NET Ramblings

item.title: AWS Transform SQL Server to PostgreSQL Schema Validation in .NET Application Modernization
item.description: Sayan Ghosh, Yuhao Zhang, Uday Kiran Erukulla, Srinivasa Varadan Saragur Madabhushi, Koushik Rajagopal, Khurram Khawaja, Vikas Babu Gali and Luke Huan contributed to this article. Migrating databases from Microsoft SQL Server to Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL – Compatible Edition is a common modernization strategy for organizations seeking to reduce licensing costs, improve scalability, and leverage open-source […] Link to article: https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/dotnet/aws-transform-sql-server-to-postgresql-schema-validation-in-net-application-modernization/
